RESOLUTION.DESC:
The Security Council,
Noting the historical context of Liberate Republicans, in which the Security Council acted to prevent the region [region]Republicans[/region] from being destroyed by [region]The Greater German Reich[/region], a troubled region which has since become defunct,
Thankful for the action that was taken to prevent Republicans from falling into nefarious hands following the passage of this liberation, ensuring that the liberation’s purpose was fulfilled,
However, dismayed by the immortalization of the names of specific nations from the The Greater German Reich in this standing Security Council resolution, all of whom have ceased to exist and do not deserve a place in the annals of Security Council history,
Affirming the lack of any present-day threats to Republicans, a region now exclusively home to puppet nations, that would warrant the continued standing of this liberation,
Acting to resolve the problematic immortalization of The Greater German Reich’s actions in a standing Security Council resolution,
Hereby Repeals “Liberate Republicans”
RESOLUTION.NAME: Repeal "Liberate Republicans"
